# Shuffle

## Tags
music, random, reorder

## Categories
multimedia, arrows

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/shuffle)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Shuffle;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Shuffle { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
